chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.2998 of 2025 (Mujahid Hussain vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 27.01.2026 Mr. Abdul Majid Abro, advocate for applicant Syed Mumtaz Ali Shah, DPG O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant is seeking post arrest bail in a case bearing Crime No.1875/2021, registered at Police Station Shah Latif Town, Karachi, u/s 6 (c) of the Control of Narcotic Substance Act, 1997, by means of this application. 2. Applicant was arrested on 02.12.2021 by a police team of Police Station Shah Latif Town, Karachi, from National Highway Soorty Mill Cut, Shah Latif Town, Karachi, and from him allegedly 21 kilograms grams and 600 grams of charas was recovered. Hence, he was booked in the present case. 3. This application for bail has been filed on the statutory ground stating that despite the lapse of three years, not a single prosecution witness has been examined. The earlier bail application of the applicant was dismissed on 16.04.2025, almost a year ago, and shows that it was not filed on the statutory ground of delay. We, therefore, dispose of this bail application, with the consent of the learned counsel for the applicant and put the applicant at liberty to move afresh bail application before the trial Court first on this ground. We also direct the trial Court to make sure that in two months’ time all the witnesses are examined for which the Court shall take all coercive methods provided in law to see that witnesses and property are produced in Court for the purpose of trial.

We, therefore, dispose of this bail application, with the consent of the learned counsel for the applicant and put the applicant at liberty to move afresh bail application before the trial Court first on this ground. We also direct the trial Court to make sure that in two months’ time all the witnesses are examined for which the Court shall take all coercive methods provided in law to see that witnesses and property are produced in Court for the purpose of trial. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
